title: EU to legislate about Chat Control behind closed doors
content: The EU plans to pass Chat Control legislation through closed-door negotiations, with limited public transparency. The bill would require encrypted messaging services to scan private communications for illegal content, raising concerns among privacy advocates and the tech community about potential surveillance and encryption backdoors.

title: Greece Is Richer. So Why Do So Many Greeks Still Feel Poor?
content: Greece's economy has recovered significantly since its debt crisis, with rising GDP and falling unemployment. However, many Greeks still feel financially strained due to low wages, high living costs, informal employment, and a weak social safety net. The disparity between macroeconomic growth and individual financial security creates a perception of poverty despite national economic improvement. Youth emigration and reduced public services further contribute to public dissatisfaction with the recovery.

title: 推荐用 Factory Droid 搭配 GLM5.2 max
content: A developer tested Claude Code, OpenCode, and Factory Droid simultaneously using the GLM5.2 max model for identical tasks. Factory Droid consistently responded fastest with accurate results, while Claude Code often spent several minutes reasoning. The developer notes that online sources confirm Droid's superior speed and lower token consumption. Despite having a simple project where deep reasoning wasn't fully tested, the developer recommends trying Factory Droid with GLM5.2 max.

title: 中国严厉打击违规的离岸投资
content: China is intensifying its crackdown on offshore investments that circumvent regulations. Authorities are targeting financial institutions and investors using loopholes to move capital abroad, aiming to curb capital flight and financial risks. The enforcement reflects Beijing's broader efforts to tighten control over cross-border fund flows and stabilize the yuan amid economic uncertainty.

title: 欧洲对人工智能股票的追捧将目光投向了电力供应商和银行
content: European investors seeking artificial intelligence opportunities are expanding beyond traditional tech stocks to target power suppliers and banks. The shift reflects growing recognition that AI infrastructure requires substantial electricity, benefiting utilities, while banks stand to gain from AI-driven efficiency improvements and cost reductions in financial services.

title: 纯用 Claude Code 搓了个对接飞书自动修告警的 Agent
content:
功能很简单，就是把它拉到飞书告警群里。它看到报警后，会自动调脚本查指标或者日志，然后在群里推 个卡片。卡片上会写清楚它发现了什么问题，以及它打算跑什么命令，只要觉得没毛病，点一下确认卡片，会自动就把问题处理了，然后把结果直接回复在原来的告警下面。


目前刚弄了个 beta 版…

title: 发现了一个非常好用的语音输入法，叫 SayIt。
content: SayIt is a free, open-source Windows voice input tool that uses the Doubao API with optional DeepSeek polishing. A user reports it is faster than Typeless with good accuracy, though mixed Chinese-English input is weaker. Setup costs roughly one yuan per hour via Volcano Engine; new accounts receive two free hours. The software is available on GitHub under the AGPL license.

title: 2028，RSI降临
content: Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark forecasts a 60% chance of recursive self-improvement (RSI)—where AI autonomously builds superior successors—by end of 2028. DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis confirms all leading labs are actively pursuing RSI, while OpenAI's Sam Altman suggests it could arrive within six months, potentially delaying the company's IPO. Evidence includes AI writing over 80% of Anthropic's code, achieving 52x training acceleration gains, and independently coding for 19 days without human intervention. These developments signal a potential "intelligence explosion" where AI progress outpaces human oversight, raising urgent safety and governance concerns.

Samsung Electronics and SK hynix will announce major domestic investment plans on June 29 at a presidential briefing chaired by South Korean President Lee Jae-myung. The decade-long investment plans covering Jeolla, Chungcheong, and Gyeongsang provinces are expected to exceed 1,000 trillion won (approximately $4.42 billion RMB).

title: AI预测世界杯小组赛：混元第一，千问DeepSeek打平
content: A 12-model AI tournament predicting 2026 World Cup group-stage results saw AI achieve 61.9% accuracy versus 54.6% for human players. Tencent Hunyuan and China Mobile Jiutian tied for first at 68.1%, while Qwen and DeepSeek scored 63.9%. AI excelled at lopsided matchups but struggled with draws (11/20 correct) and upsets. Most models rely on prompt engineering or RAG rather than rigorous statistical methods. As the knockout stage begins with more evenly matched teams and elimination format, predictions face greater uncertainty. The exercise tests AI's ability to handle real-world unpredictability beyond abstract benchmarks.

title: 想换个大电池（9000mAh 以上）的手机，哪家的好？求推荐个型号
content:
The user wants a phone with a battery over 9000mAh, mainly for daily apps and video, not gaming. They mention Honor, Redmi, and OnePlus as options. They want recommendations on which is better and a specific model.

Since I need to output only the summary text in English, 80 words or fewer, declarative, no marketing language:

The user seeks a smartphone with a battery capacity exceeding 9000mAh for everyday use including apps and video streaming, not gaming. They have identified Honor, Redmi, and OnePlus as potential brands offering such large batteries and request a specific model recommendation among these options.

Let me count: 39 words. Good.

Wait, let me verify if this captures everything needed. The user wants to know which brand is better and a specific model recommendation. The summary should state this declaratively.

Revised: The user seeks a smartphone with a battery exceeding 9000mAh for

title: 省钱，我只服梁文锋
content: DeepSeek's server instability issues may be resolved through DSpark, a speculative decoding method co-authored by founder Liang Wenfeng. The technique combines draft model prediction with confidence-based scheduling verification, achieving 60-85% faster response times and 51% higher GPU throughput without sacrificing output quality. By dynamically adjusting verification depth based on server load, DSpark prevents peak-hour crashes. The accompanying DeepSpec training framework is open-sourced, enabling broader industry adoption. This reflects Liang's 16-year focus on algorithmic cost reduction, driven by his unique position as sole funder, manager, and researcher at DeepSeek.

title: GPT-5.6刚发布就被限流，海外断供却成了国产AI利好？
content: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 launched on June 27 under strict U.S. regulatory constraints, with access limited to approved enterprises only—mirroring earlier restrictions on Anthropic's top models. This regulatory shift from post-hoc enforcement to pre-approval access marks the end of unfettered AI competition. The unpredictability creates supply risks for businesses dependent on foreign APIs, elevating compliance and data sovereignty alongside technical performance in model selection. Chinese AI firms like Zhipu (GLM-5.2), Alibaba (Qwen), and ByteDance (Doubao) are capitalizing on this vacuum, offering open, unrestricted alternatives with strong B-side applications. The landscape is pushing enterprises toward open-source models and local deployment to build autonomous, resilient AI infrastructure rather than relying on potentially disrupted cloud services.

title: 94年小伙融资30亿，教AI玩游戏
content: General Intuition, founded by 1994-born Dutch entrepreneur Pim de Witte, raised $320 million in Series A funding led by Khosla Ventures, with Eric Schmidt and Jeff Bezos participating. The AI company uses gameplay footage from its platform Medal—where player actions are tagged with corresponding controls—to train AI systems in spatial-temporal reasoning. This approach addresses the scarcity of physical action data needed for robotics, drones, and autonomous systems. The company, valued at $2.3 billion with total funding of $454 million, aims to become a foundational model provider for action-based AI applications beyond gaming.

title: GTA 6 没有杀死实体游戏，因为它已经死了
content: GTA 6's physical edition contains only a download code, signaling the continued decline of physical games. This trend stems from rising game sizes, reduced production costs, elimination of used game markets, and higher digital profit margins for platform holders like Sony. Physical game revenue for Sony dropped from 6% to 3% between 2020 and 2024, while digital sales now dominate at 81-93% for major publishers. Physical media is transitioning from functional storage to collectible cultural symbol.

title: 关于 Loop Engineering 的实践与反思
content: "Loop Engineering" is a development methodology proposed by AI team members, dividing work into four stages: issue discovery, parallel Git worktree development, agent-based verification to prevent hallucinations, and context storage via MCP to tools like Linear or Notion for future retrieval. The author questions whether this can work without human oversight, noting agents may miss edge cases. They suggest domestic alternatives like GitHub Issues, Feishu, or local markdown files instead of third-party services. The author also criticizes current agent paradigms as merely repackaging prompt engineering with new terminology.

title: 抱抱脸模型TOP榜，我现在只服yuxinlu1
content: Individual developer Lu Yuxin (yuxinlu1) ranked high on Hugging Face's trending models, with combined downloads exceeding 700,000. His two GGUF-quantized models distill Fable 5's coding reasoning into Google's Gemma 4-12B, runnable locally with only 4.5GB VRAM. V1 focuses on code generation using verified training data; V2 adds agentic multi-step tool capabilities, achieving 3.5x baseline performance. Lu, an AI graduate student, created these as self-funded side projects using an RTX 5090 and Claude Max subscription. He emphasizes data quality over quantity and values privacy and free local access. He plans V3 and a larger Qwen3.6-27B version.

title: 花68元，我们让豆包干完了一个小团队的活
content: For 68 yuan, the professional version of AI assistant Doubao was tested on complex tasks: building an international website from scratch within 30 minutes including web crawling, visual recognition, and HTML generation; compiling a business contact spreadsheet from over 100 brand logos in under 10 minutes; and creating promotional posters from past data. Unlike the free version, the professional version offers faster execution and better self-correction abilities with minimal human intervention. The review concludes that the subscription is worthwhile for users integrating AI into their workflows, transforming it from a chat tool into an independent digital assistant.

title: DeepSeek开始造富
content: DeepSeek is transitioning from a secretive research lab to a commercial company by hiring aggressively, raising 51 billion yuan at a 40 billion yuan valuation, and establishing a Harness team to compete in the global AI Agent market. This signals a broader shift in China's AI industry, where employees can now share in wealth creation through stock options. The author argues that AI represents the first major wealth-creation opportunity since mobile internet, extending beyond tech companies to professionals in all industries who adopt AI tools to transform their work.

title: 2026 06 28 HackerNews
content: Top Hacker News stories cover U.S. government control over AI model releases—approving access to OpenAI's GPT-5.6 and Anthropic's Claude Mythos 5 for select domestic organizations while excluding non-U.S. users, sparking fears of regulatory capture and stifled competition. OpenAI previewed faster, more secure GPT-5.6 variants without pricing or launch dates. DeepSeek's DSpark framework accelerates LLM inference through speculative decoding. An anonymous researcher published multiple unpatched zero-day exploits affecting 7zip, Docker, and others. A Meta whistleblower faces millions in arbitration fines for exposing company misconduct. OpenRA released game engine improvements including procedural map generation. California's AB2047 would mandate 3D printer surveillance, drawing EFF criticism. Technology journalist Om Malik died at 61. A fintech engineering handbook outlines principles for robust monetary software.

title: 一折买 Miu Miu，谁在做奢侈品牌的"拼多多"？｜商业Friday
content: Luxury flash-sale platforms like On The List and Openmaxx are emerging in Chinese cities as members-only channels selling discounted designer goods through time-limited pop-ups. Unlike traditional outlets, they operate on lighter retail models, buying inventory directly from brands or selling on commission. The trend reflects growing inventory pressures in the luxury sector—Kering plans to cut €1 billion in stock by 2026. Originally handling outdated goods, these platforms now feature current hot brands like Miu Miu and The Row, becoming standard inventory management tools. However, platforms face challenges securing stable supply and are expanding into permanent stores and diverse product categories to survive.

title: 大陆女子身中213刀死于香港出租屋，三段感情酿悲剧，凶手竟改判误杀 | 原文
content: A 35-year-old mainland Chinese woman was stabbed 213 times and killed in a Hong Kong rental apartment in 2009. Her killer, a married man with whom she had an affair, was convicted of murder three times. After serving 12 years in prison, Hong Kong's Court of Final Appeal overturned the conviction to manslaughter based on diminished responsibility, citing the defendant's depression and steroid use, and ordered his immediate release.

title: 220万条美国城市法律被一夜「扒光」！AI研究者狂扫700万页PDF：你家能不能养鸡，从此全透明 | 原文
content: AI researchers extracted 2.2 million U.S. municipal laws from 7 million pages of PDF documents, creating the first searchable database of local regulations. Previously, residents struggled to find clear guidance on permits and rules through outdated government websites, often facing fines for unintentional violations. The breakthrough enables transparent access to information about property restrictions, such as whether residents can keep chickens in their backyards.

title: 苹果涨价后有商家拒绝发货
content: Some consumers who ordered Apple products before a price increase had their shipments unilaterally refused by merchants. One customer ordered an iPad Air 8 on June 25 for 4,268 yuan; the next day, the seller cited rising procurement costs after Apple's official price adjustment and declined to ship. The same model's price had jumped to 6,268 yuan overnight, a 2,000-yuan increase. Media reports highlighted similar incidents following Apple's sudden price hikes on iPads and Macs.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 虎嗅网

title: 微信回应朋友圈互动规则：单删原封不动，互删清空对方全部痕迹
content: WeChat clarified Moments interaction rules: one-sided deletion preserves interactions; mutual deletion removes all traces, which restore if re-added. Group visibility depends on current friend groups. In 2026 updates, deleting friends can preserve chat history, and version 8.0.75 trials an AI assistant "Xiaowei" with chat summarization. WeChat and WeChat combined monthly active accounts reached 1.432 billion, up 2% year-over-year; 780 million users enter Moments daily, with 120 million sharing content.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 界面

title: Anthropic：Mythos 5获准向美国机构重新部署
content: Anthropic announced that the U.S. government has approved redeployment of its cybersecurity model Mythos 5 to select American institutions. The company has been working with the government since June 12 to restore access to both Mythos 5 and Fable 5. Anthropic continues collaborating with officials to expand Mythos 5 access and restore public availability of Fable 5. Multiple news sources reported that over 100 institutions may receive access under the agreement.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 财联社

title: 美光 CEO 吐槽苹果定价模式：芯片采购价涨 45 美元，向消费者加价 250 美元
content: Micron's CEO criticized Apple's pricing model, stating that while Micron increased chip prices by $45, Apple raised consumer prices by $250. Micron's Chief Business Officer implied some customers bear responsibility for current memory supply shortages, noting that previous low-price procurement during market downturns drove Micron's gross margin negative and forced industry-wide investment cuts in 2023. Meanwhile, Apple announced price increases for Mac and iPad products, citing cost pressures from AI data center expansion causing memory chip shortages.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 金融界

title: 最近新出现个 oxidns，很好用啊
content:
这个 oxidns 作者说是受 mosdns 启发，用 rust 写的。我已经用了 20 多天吧，用了几个版本，现在功能很完善了。说下我感觉好用的几点： 它带了一个 web ui ，mosdns 上面还没找到好用的 web
它带有 dns 查询统计，可以直接在 web 上查看的…
